chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No.935 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply as at “A” 2. For orders on M.A. No.15431/2025 3. For hearing of main case ------------------------- 13.02.2026 None present for the applicant. Same was the position on the last date of hearing viz. 24.10.2025. Continuous absence of applicant, who is a practicing advocate, as well as her counsel reflects that they have lost interest in pursuing this application, which is accordingly dismissed on account of non-prosecution, along with pending application(s). J U D G E Gulsher/PS
